# vanam-erudite

> A personal blog and portfolio built with Astro, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui. Based on the astro-erudite v2 theme.

Developer and open-source enthusiast who builds things, breaks things, and sometimes writes about what they learn along the way.

## Blog

- [All posts](https://vanam-erudite2.vercel.app/blog): Technical articles and tutorials on development, tools, and learning

## Projects

- [Open-source projects](https://vanam-erudite2.vercel.app/projects): Experiments and code repositories

## Gallery

- [Photo collections](https://vanam-erudite2.vercel.app/gallery): Visual content and photography

## Setup

- [Development environment](https://vanam-erudite2.vercel.app/setup): Hardware and software configuration

## About

- [About me](https://vanam-erudite2.vercel.app/about): Background and contact information
- [GitHub](https://github.com/vanam-san): Source code and contributions

## Optional

- [RSS feed](https://vanam-erudite2.vercel.app/rss.xml): Subscribe to blog updates
- [Sitemap](https://vanam-erudite2.vercel.app/sitemap-index.xml): Full site structure
